key_values.expected: payload length should be bounded by available bytes before resize
key_values.actual: multi-gigabyte allocation attempted before ReadRaw() validates availability

notes: LLDB breakpoint resolution succeeded but launch-time debugger access was blocked by macOS taskport permissions. A printf fallback against the same ParseMessageSetItemImpl path confirmed the oversized allocation attempt. The original example value near 0xffffffff is filtered by the signedness guard, but a positive attacker-controlled value 0x7ffffff0 reaches the vulnerable branch.
